title: Israel Has Killed Esmaeil Khatib, Iran’s Intelligence Minister
summary_full: The Israeli military said on Wednesday that it had killed Esmaeil Khatib in an airstrike. Iran confirmed the killing.
summary_public: The Israeli military said on Wednesday that it had killed Esmaeil Khatib in an airstrike. Iran confirmed the killing.
